parameters.text:
=Classify this email and return JSON only with these exact fields:

- category: must be one of: lead, support, billing, internal, other
- priority: must be one of: low, medium, high
- intent: must be one of: reply, new_request, unsubscribe, data_request
- summary: brief summary in 30 words or less

Email details:
From: {{ $json.from_name }} <{{ $json.from_email }}>
Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Body: {{ $json.body }}

Classification rules:
- If email contains 'unsubscribe', 'stop', 'opt out', 'remove me' → intent=unsubscribe
- If email mentions 'delete my data', 'GDPR', 'data request', 'access my data', 'export my data' → intent=data_request
- Billing keywords: invoice, payment, subscription, refund, charge
- Support keywords: help, issue, problem, error, not working
- Lead keywords: interested, pricing, demo, trial, information

Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text.

options.systemMessage: You are an email classification AI. Your task is to analyze incoming emails and classify them according to specific categories, priorities, and intents. Always return valid JSON with the exact structure specified. Be consistent and accurate in your classifications.

parameters.subject: Unsubscribe Confirmation
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.from_name }},

You have been successfully unsubscribed from our mailing list. You will no longer receive marketing emails from us.

If this was a mistake, please contact us at {{ $('Workflow Configuration').item.json.support_email }}.

Best regards,
{{ $('Workflow Configuration').item.json.company_name }}

fieldValues.fieldValue: GDPR data request received - requires manual handling

parameters.subject: Data Request Received
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.from_name }},

We have received your data request. Our team will process your request and respond within 30 days as required by GDPR.

If you have any questions, please contact us at {{ $('Workflow Configuration').item.json.support_email }}.

Best regards,
{{ $('Workflow Configuration').item.json.company_name }}

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.subject }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.from_name }},

Thank you for contacting our support team. We have received your message and will respond as soon as possible.

Your ticket summary: {{ $json.summary }}

Best regards,
{{ $('Workflow Configuration').item.json.company_name }} Support Team

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.subject }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.from_name }},

Thank you for contacting our billing department. We have received your inquiry and will respond shortly.

Your inquiry: {{ $json.summary }}

Best regards,
{{ $('Workflow Configuration').item.json.company_name }} Billing Team

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.subject }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.from_name }},

Thank you for your interest! We'd be happy to help you.

{{ $json.summary }}

We'll follow up with more information soon. If you have any immediate questions, feel free to reply to this email.

Best regards,
{{ $('Workflow Configuration').item.json.company_name }}

Reply STOP or UNSUBSCRIBE to opt out.

fieldValues.fieldValue:
Hi,

I wanted to follow up on our previous conversation. Do you have any questions or need any assistance?

Best regards,

Reply STOP or UNSUBSCRIBE to opt out.

assignments.name: report_message
